files_changed.change: Add isUsed(pageID) check inside FreePage's existing mu-held critical section, before setUsed(pageID, false); return an explicit error if the page is already free (double-free).
Add new standalone TestFreePageDoubleFreeRejected: allocate a page, free it, free it again, assert the second call returns a non-nil error and the first call's success is unaffected.

call_site_survey.method: grep -rn "FreePage" --include="*.go" . (repo-wide), plus targeted grep -rn "FreePage" --include="*.go" engine/split engine/mvcc engine/btree engine/wal
call_site_survey.result: Only non-comment call sites of FreePage in the whole repo are in engine/catalog/file_test.go (existing tests). Zero matches in engine/split, engine/mvcc, engine/btree, engine/wal.
call_site_survey.conclusion: No existing caller anywhere relies on double-free being a silent no-op. Safe to make the second call return an explicit error with no behavioral break to any current caller.

risk: low; change is additive (new error path only triggered on redundant free of an already-free page), existing single-free and allocate/free/reallocate flows unaffected.
concurrency_note: New check placed inside the already-held fm.mu critical section in FreePage; no new lock scope introduced.
